arts.ttl: Report: Xabi Alonso could be Real Madrid boss in summer
arts.sum: Die Werkself's head coach could be tempted into becoming head coach of his former club ahead of the 2025-26 campaign.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star considered by the club as ‘the best in the world’ in his new role
arts.sum: An insight into just how impressed those behind the scenes at La Liga giants Real Madrid have been with the recent performances of Federico Valverde has on Friday been provided.…

arts.ttl: UEFA’s Latest Economic Report: How It Impacted Real Madrid
arts.sum: The latest UEFA report also sheds light on the updated distribution model for the Champions League, which now sees €670 million shared among the 36 clubs that qualify for the final phase. arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “I will not decide when my adventure with Real Madrid will end”
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti appeared in a conversation on Giacomo Poretti’s podcast, and shared candid thoughts on his coaching experiences, the modern game, and some of the key players he has worked with. There is no one owner like in other clubs.

arts.ttl: How much did Real Madrid & Barcelona earn for last season’s Champions League?
